task_completion.description: Open and read the AUDIT_REPORT.md file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the contents of /home/ga/workspace/agency_dashboard/AUDIT_REPORT.md.

task_completion.description: Add language tags and image alt text to the HTML.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML file open in an editor showing the addition of a 'lang' attribute to the tag and 'alt' attributes to tags.

task_completion.description: Replace non-semantic elements with semantic HTML elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML file open in an editor showing semantic tags (e.g., <main>, <nav>, <header>, <section>) being used instead of generic <div> or <span> tags.

task_completion.description: Implement ARIA attributes in HTML or JS files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: HTML or JS files open in an editor showing the addition of ARIA attributes (e.g., aria-label, aria-hidden, aria-expanded, role) to interactive elements.

task_completion.description: Update CSS to meet minimum color contrast ratios.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSS file open in an editor showing modified 'color' or 'background-color' hex/rgb values designed to increase contrast.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a text editor to genuinely modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual text editor (like VS Code, vim, or nano) being used to edit the files, rather than overwriting files blindly with terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard's original functionality and structure are preserved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The core layout, text content, and non-accessibility-related code in the HTML, CSS, and JS files remain intact and were not deleted or completely rewritten.

integrity.description: Verify the agent targeted the specific files in the workspace directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the editor or terminal explicitly point to /home/ga/workspace/agency_dashboard/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workspace is located at /home/ga/workspace/agency_dashboard. The task requires fixing exactly 7 WCAG 2.1 Level AA violations across HTML, CSS, and JS files. The verifier explicitly checks for the following compliance domains: 'lang' tags, 'alt' text on images, ARIA attributes, semantic HTML elements, and updated CSS color contrast ratios. A passing score requires at least 60% of these fixes to be correctly implemented.
